user.description: Set up Tessera RBAC for Home Assistant.
user.title: Tessera

set_mode.title: Set mode
set_mode.description: off restores Tessera-managed native auth state and stops; monitor compiles a read-only preview; enforce applies Tessera-managed native auth after all gates pass.

add_role.title: Add role
add_role.description: Create a Tessera role. The id is permanent; name and description are optional.

remove_role.title: Remove role
remove_role.description: Remove a role together with all of its grants and memberships.

add_area_grant.title: Add area grant
add_area_grant.description: Grant a role read and/or control on every entity in an area.

remove_area_grant.title: Remove area grant
remove_area_grant.description: Remove one Area x Role grant.

error.invalid: That input is not valid. Please check it and try again.
error.no_area_grants: There are no area grants to remove.

recompile.name: Recompile
recompile.description: Recompiles every loaded Tessera entry for its current mode: a read-only preview in off/monitor, or a native re-apply (writes the auth store) in enforce. Takes no input.

acknowledge_component.name: Acknowledge component
acknowledge_component.description: Acknowledge a custom component so its D9 conflict-veto is overridden for the current installed version (admin-only; the ack auto-invalidates if the component changes).

domain.name: Domain
domain.description: The custom component domain to acknowledge.

revoke_component_ack.name: Revoke component acknowledgement
revoke_component_ack.description: Revoke a D9 custom component acknowledgement and immediately recompile Tessera's current mode.

domain.name: Domain
domain.description: The custom component domain whose acknowledgement should be revoked.

set_membership.name: Set membership
set_membership.description: Assign Tessera roles to one Home Assistant user. Admin-only; in enforce mode this recompiles through Tessera's guarded apply path.

user_id.name: User id
user_id.description: The Home Assistant user id to manage.

role_ids.name: Role ids
role_ids.description: List of Tessera role ids to assign. Use an empty list to remove this user's Tessera membership.

set_floor_grant.name: Set floor grant
set_floor_grant.description: Grant or remove a Tessera role's read/control access for every entity on a Home Assistant floor. Admin-only; in enforce mode this recompiles through Tessera's guarded apply path.

floor_id.name: Floor id
floor_id.description: The Home Assistant floor id to manage.

role_id.name: Role id
role_id.description: The Tessera role id receiving or losing the floor grant.

read.name: Read
read.description: Grant read access. Control also implies read.

control.name: Control
control.description: Grant control access. Set both read and control to false to remove this floor grant.

import.name: Import model
import.description: Provision the whole Tessera model in one declarative, idempotent call: each provided dimension replaces that dimension, omitted ones are preserved. Mode and D9 acks are never changed. Admin-only; in enforce mode this recompiles through Tessera's guarded apply path.

roles.name: Roles
roles.description: Role map: role id maps to name and optional is_admin. Replaces config.roles when provided.

memberships.name: Memberships
memberships.description: Membership map: user id maps to a list of role ids. Replaces config.membership.by_user when provided.

area_grants.name: Area grants
area_grants.description: Grants: area id, then role id, then read/control booleans. Replaces policy.area_grants when provided.

floor_grants.name: Floor grants
floor_grants.description: Grants: floor id, then role id, then read/control booleans. Replaces policy.floor_grants when provided.

entity_overrides.name: Entity overrides
entity_overrides.description: Overrides: entity id, then role id, then read/control booleans. Replaces policy.entity_overrides when provided.

enforce_fail_safe.title: Tessera fell back to monitor mode
enforce_fail_safe.description: Tessera refused or stopped enforce mode for entry {entry_id} and persisted monitor mode. Reason: {reason}.

restore_fail_safe.title: Tessera restore needs attention
restore_fail_safe.description: Tessera could not complete restore for entry {entry_id}. It fell back to monitor mode where possible. Reason: {reason}.
